title: DNA Polymerase
summary: Generic name for an enzyme that synthesizes DNA from a template using free dNTPs. In PCR, a heat-stable DNA polymerase like Taq polymerase (from Thermus aquaticus) is used so the enzyme isn't destroyed during the 95 °C denaturation step. In cells, multiple specialized polymerases exist (see enzymes/dna-polymerase-iii, enzymes/dna-polymerase-i).
